text: I am suspended between two worlds: the bustling meeting room, filled with the quiet buzz of minds at work, and this bold, imaginative space devoted to innovation and research. I feel the contrast acutely—one is pragmatic and collaborative, while the other beckons with curiosity and open-ended possibility. Here, the future is both designed and discovered. I feel excited, yet contemplative, as if standing at a threshold where ideas and reality intermingle.
